sections.description: Sales Report for SureCart - CSV Sales Reports for Individual products or Price IDs using the SureCart API
sections.installation:
1. Upload the `sales-report-for-surecart` folder to the `/wp-content/plugins/` directory.
2. Activate the plugin through the 'Plugins' menu in WordPress.
3. Its now ready to use
